title: Bloons TD Battles
description:
Play the top-rated tower defense franchise in this free head-to-head strategy game.

It's monkey vs monkey for the first time ever - go head to head with other players in a Bloon-popping battle for victory. From the creators of best-selling Bloons TD 6, this game is specially designed for intense multiplayer combat, featuring over 50 custom head-to-head tracks, incredible towers and upgrades, all-new range of powers, and the ability to control bloons directly and send them charging past your opponent's defenses. Easy to learn, hard to master - this game offers endless fun for casual and competitive players alike!

Check out these awesome features!

* Head-to-head two player Bloons TD

* Over 50 custom Battles tracks

* 22 awesome monkey towers, each with 8 powerful upgrades, including the never before seen C.O.B.R.A. Tower.

Multiple ways to play!

* Assault Mode - manage strong defenses and send bloons directly against your opponent

* Defense Mode - build up your income and outlast your challenger with your superior defenses

* Battle Arenas - Put your medallions on the line in a high stakes Assault game. Winner takes all.

* Card Battles - Build the ultimate deck to slam your opponents in this unique twist on bloons TD gameplay.

Even more awesomeness! 

* All new Powers - supercharge your towers, boost your bloons, or try the new sabotage, eco, and track powers.

* Battle it out for top scores on the weekly leaderboards and win awesome prizes.

* Create and join private matches to challenge any of your friends

* Build your clan and work together to be the best of the best for weekly rewards.

* Customize your bloons with decals, or grab new tower skins so your victory has a signature stamp

* 16 cool achievements to claim

REQUIRES INTERNET CONNECTION

**********

Ninja Kiwi Notes:

Please review our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy. You will be prompted in-game to accept these terms in order to cloud save and protect your game progress:

 

Bloons TD Battles contains in-game items that can be purchased with real money. You can disable in-app purchases in your device’s settings, or reach us at for help. Your purchases fund our development updates and new games, and we sincerely appreciate every vote of confidence you give us with your purchases.

Ninja Kiwi Community:

We love hearing from our players, so please get in touch with any feedback, positive or negative, at 

Streamers and Video Creators:

Ninja Kiwi is actively promoting channel creators on YouTube and Twitch! If you are not already working with us, keep making videos and tell us about your channel at streamers@ninjakiwi.com.

From the creators of best-selling Bloons TD 6, this all new Battles game is specially designed for multiplayer combat, featuring the ability to control bloons directly and send them charging past your opponent's defenses.
